basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) has officially announced the Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published at aniims.org. Candidates holding an MBBS qualification as per NMC norms are eligible to submit their applications via email on or before 23 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and email application details are shared below.

salary_details.details: Consolidated monthly pay of Rs.86,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Overview
ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 23-07-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lady Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Lady Medical Officer post is MBBS, as per the norms set by the National Medical Commission (NMC).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Lady Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 86,000/- per month for the Lady Medical Officer position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. You should prepare your application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Lady Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Lady Medical Officer post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Lady Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Lady Medical Officer post will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) located?
faq.answer: ANIIMS is located in Sri Vijaya Puram, Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a link to the PDF is provided.
